compiled_state.title: RED test: _ensure_initialized spawns zero python3 processes and bash md5 is byte-identical to Python
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Story
564c-e391 — ticket CLI dispatcher init runs without spawning Python processes

## What to Implement
Create tests/scripts/test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh with failing tests that assert:
1. _ensure_initialized spawns ZERO python3 processes on the default (non-legacy) path
2. The bash-native md5 hash (echo -n "$tracker_dir" | md5sum | cut -c1-12) produces byte-identical output to Python's hashlib.md5(s.encode()).hexdigest()[:12] for representative inputs including paths with spaces and special chars
3. DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 restores the Python-backed path (python3 IS invoked)

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)
**DD1 zero-python3**:
- Given: a temp git repo with ticket initialized and _TICKET_TEST_NO_SYNC=1
- When: ticket show <id> is called without DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1
- Then: no python3 process is spawned during _ensure_initialized (verify by overriding python3 in PATH to a sentinel that exits non-zero and asserting no failure)

**DD2 hash byte-identity**:
- Given: a set of representative path strings (normal, with spaces, unicode, long)
- When: bash md5 hash is computed via the new implementation
- Then: output matches Python's hashlib.md5(s.encode()).hexdigest()[:12] character-for-character for each input

**DD3 legacy routing**:
- Given: DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 is set
- When: ticket show <id> is called
- Then: python3 IS invoked (the sentinel python3 in PATH is called and the function still succeeds using the original Python path)

## File
- Create: tests/scripts/test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh

## .test-index RED marker
Update .test-index with RED marker for plugins/dso/scripts/ticket:
  plugins/dso/scripts/ticket: tests/scripts/test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh [test_ensure_initialized_no_python3]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_ensure_initialized_no_python3 function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_ensure_initialized_no_python3' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_md5_12_byte_identical function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_md5_12_byte_identical' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_dso_ticket_legacy_restores_python function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_dso_ticket_legacy_restores_python' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh
- [ ] Tests FAIL (RED) when run against current unmodified code
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_ensure_initialized_no_python3] for plugins/dso/scripts/ticket
  Verify: grep 'test_ensure_initialized_no_python3' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (excluding the new RED test via RED marker)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: AC amendment: test_md5_12_byte_identical must iterate over representative inputs (plain path, path with spaces, unicode, trailing slash) to catch encoding/locale drift between bash printf '%s' | md5sum and Python hashlib.md5(s.encode()).hexdigest()[:12]
comments.author: Test

comments.body: AC amendment: test_ensure_initialized_no_python3 must use a PATH shim — prepend a test-only dir containing a 'python3' sentinel wrapper that writes to a counter file and execs the real binary. Assert counter file is empty/absent after the ticket call. This is the portable detection mechanism (not ps/strace).
comments.author: Test
